Package neqsim.process.safety.rupture

      private Builder(PipeFireRuptureInput input, PipeFireRuptureMaterial material, PipeFireRuptureScenario scenario, BlowdownPressureProfile pressureProfile)
      Creates a builder.
      Parameters:
      input - pipe input object
      material - material curve
      scenario - fire scenario
      pressureProfile - pressure profile

  • Method Details

    • timeStepSeconds

      public PipeFireRuptureStudy.Builder timeStepSeconds(double timeStepSeconds)
      Sets the calculation time step.
      Parameters:
      timeStepSeconds - time step in seconds; must be positive
      Returns:
      this builder

    • maxTimeSeconds

      public PipeFireRuptureStudy.Builder maxTimeSeconds(double maxTimeSeconds)
      Sets the maximum simulation time.
      Parameters:
      maxTimeSeconds - maximum time in seconds; must be positive
      Returns:
      this builder

    • spreadsheetGasThermalMass

      public PipeFireRuptureStudy.Builder spreadsheetGasThermalMass(boolean spreadsheetGasThermalMass)
      Selects whether gas thermal mass follows the legacy spreadsheet ideal-gas approximation.
      Parameters:
      spreadsheetGasThermalMass - true to include gas thermal mass for gas cases
      Returns:
      this builder

    • build

      public PipeFireRuptureStudy build()
      Builds the study.
      Returns:
      pipe fire-rupture study

      Validates the builder state.
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the builder is invalid
